title.en: Ye Tian was a little surprised by this.

content.en:
"A high-level immeasurable lifeform is lost here?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised by this.

Moreover, this high-level immeasurable lifeform did not break through here, but was already a high-level immeasurable lifeform before entering, but there was still no way to escape from here.

Therefore, the Great Ancestor here had already given up and left, but chose to wait here for the opportunity slowly.

Maybe one day something goes wrong with the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, or maybe there is an even more terrifying existence that breaks through the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, then they will be free!

But there are still great ancestors who feel too bored and can't see hope, so they choose to sleep on their own, and they have been sleeping until the endless long years later.

"There seems to be something special here, I look like a red mountain from the outside, it's a little different from other lost places!"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Other Lost Lands?"

The great ancestors present were a little ignorant, after all, they hadn't been to other lost places, and if they were, they would definitely not be able to get out, so there was no way to compare.

But soon, Ye Tian learned something that surprised him from these Great Ancestors.

It turns out that somewhere in this lost land, there is a treasure land that can help the great ancestors to comprehend the immeasurable path.

Of course, there are very few great ancestors who can really be enlightened, and some great ancestors have no hope of enlightening even if they have been enlightened for an infinite number of years.

Moreover, that treasure land is also dangerous, once you enter it, if you don't come out for a long time, you will never be able to come out, unless one day you have realized the immeasurable ultimate path, you can come out again.

There was a great ancestor who did not come out in time, stayed in that treasure land for countless years, and then realized the immeasurable path to come out.

According to his description, it is impossible to get out of that treasure in time, and it will be confined to a small area, and the area will continue to shrink.

In the end, the Great Ancestor who fell into it will be frozen, and if he has not yet realized the Immeasurable Extreme Dao at this time, the Immeasurable Will and Thinking will also be frozen.

As for what the final outcome will be, no one knows, and it is likely to be a complete fall.

And that Great Ancestor was about to be frozen in the immeasurable will, and he had an epiphany under the crisis of death, and he successfully escaped.

And after comprehending the Immeasurable Extreme Path, if you want to enter that treasure land again, you can't do it, and you are not allowed to enter.

......

"It's a good thing that this replica body was not annihilated, otherwise I would have missed this treasure land!"

Ye Tian said excitedly in his heart.

If he could comprehend the Immeasurable Extreme Path here, his strength would be terrifyingly enhanced!

The Infinite Extreme Dao is the realm of the Dao that countless great ancestors have dreamed of, and few of those middle-level immeasurable life forms in the outside world have realized the Immeasurable Extreme Dao, and only those high-level immeasurable life forms have the hope of comprehending the Immeasurable Extreme Dao.

But here, there are not just one or two middle-level immeasurable lifeforms that have realized the Infinite Extreme Dao, but many!

In the following days, Ye Tian consulted with the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms here, and even personally felt the power of the immeasurable supreme path.

At the very least, this way you have some understanding of the Immeasurable Extreme Path.

After having some understanding of the Infinite Extreme Dao, Ye Tian was ready to go to that mysterious treasure land.

this day.

Ye Tian went to the treasure land that these great ancestors said about.

Just as Ye Tian passed, these Great Ancestors were whispering.

"The great ancestor who just came in is still full of activity, and he still wants to improve his strength and comprehend the immeasurable extreme way, but unfortunately it is useless, even if he realizes it, what can he do, it's not that he can't go out!"

"Hahahaha, people have just been lost, and they still have hope, which is also normal! When he is trapped here for endless years, he will slowly lose the idea of progress!"

"Forget it, I'm going to sleep, I hope that next time I wake up, there will be a way to get out!"

......

"This is it!"

Ye Tian stared at a black abyss in front of him and muttered.

This abyss is the treasure land that the Great Ancestors said, and from the outside, nothing can be seen, and even the immeasurable will cannot penetrate into it.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly entered this black abyss.

As soon as he entered the Black Abyss, Ye Tian felt it slightly, and found that the sense of loss in the Black Abyss was increasing at a very slow rate.

Whether he can stay here or not can be sensed.

"What a strange place!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the Immeasurable Extreme Dao.

When he tried to attain enlightenment, his own immeasurable dao permeated the surrounding void, and then under the suppression of an inexplicable force, the immeasurable dao of the extreme realm began to compress and evolve.

"Direction!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

This abyss can actually allow his own Immeasurable Dao to evolve step by step, which is equivalent to pointing out the direction of comprehending the Immeasurable Extreme Dao!

Of course, this abyss is only a preliminary guide, it belongs to the beginning, and you still need to understand it later, and the difficulty is still very terrifying.

In addition, in this abyss, the enlightenment of the immeasurable path is also many times faster than the outside world.

If a Great Ancestor who has not yet raised the Infinite Dao to the Extreme Realm enters here, it will definitely not be long before he can raise the Infinite Dao to the Extreme Realm.

It's a pity that the Great Ancestors must be lost before they can enter here.

If the Great Ancestors of the outside world knew that there was such a place here, they would not have come here.

......

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the immeasurable path here.

From the confusion at the beginning, I gradually had a little understanding, and then I sensed the prototype of the Infinite Extreme Dao, and completely understood the direction.

The immeasurable pole path is a prototype!

The prototype of the Infinite Pole Road is two!

The prototype of the immeasurable pole road is three!

Time flies, and tens of thousands of worlds have passed in a blink of an eye.

At this time, Ye Tian's Infinite Extreme Dao Prototype had already comprehended more than ninety percent of the realm.

"According to those Great Ancestors, if you haven't comprehended the Immeasurable Extreme Dao in the first year of the 100 million realms, you have to go out, otherwise your body will be trapped, and your mind will be frozen quickly, and incredible changes will occur. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And now he has only comprehended tens of thousands of realms in the first year, and he is about to comprehend the immeasurable extreme path, and the speed of comprehension is not known how many times faster than these great ancestors.

this day.

Ye Tian's Infinite Extreme Dao prototype is finally about to usher in a real transformation.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying immeasurable Extreme Dao aura diffused from Ye Tian's body, and at this moment, he had completely comprehended the Immeasurable Extreme Dao.

At the same time, the abyss began to crowd him out.

"I can't stay here any longer!"

Ye Tian's body moved, and he directly left this abyss and returned to the outside of the abyss.
